focus: Detect generated PNG whitespace artifacts deterministically
hypothesis: Many generated PNGs contain large blank top or bottom margins even when dimensions are not extreme; an integrity audit using the rendered non-white bounding box will expose those artifacts before/after repair.
planned_changes: Add rendered-crop whitespace finding collection to output integrity audit
Compute conservative non-white bounding boxes for PNGs and flag extreme blank margins
Add synthetic regression coverage for bottom-blank PNG artifacts
acceptance: Synthetic blank-margin PNG fails with suspicious_rendered_crop_whitespace
Normal content and all-white placeholder PNGs do not create false positives
Audit report includes counts, checks, summary, and review candidates
